name: threads-affiliate-trend-finder
description: Desktop research app for discovering trending Threads posts and generating AI affiliate product ideas.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "next dev -p 3000" "tsup src/electron/main.ts src/electron/preload.ts --format cjs --platform node --out-dir dist/electron --external electron --external better-sqlite3 --external playwright --external openai --watch" "wait-on tcp:3000 file:dist/electron/main.js && electron ."
scripts.build: next build && tsup src/electron/main.ts src/electron/preload.ts --format cjs --platform node --out-dir dist/electron --external electron --external better-sqlite3 --external playwright --external openai
scripts.db:init: npm rebuild better-sqlite3 && tsx src/server/db/init.ts && npm run electron:rebuild
